title: That Man from Rio
writer: Jean-Paul Rappeneau, Ariane Mnouchkine, Daniel Boulanger
actors: Jean-Paul Belmondo, Françoise Dorléac, Jean Servais
plot: A young private on military leave comes to the rescue of his girlfriend who's been abducted by thieves and brought to Rio de Janeiro. An extravagant adventure ensues.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 2 wins & 2 nominations total
